statement: In every magma, Equation 613 (`x = y * (z * (w * (u * v)))`) implies Equation 3285 (`x * x = y * (y * (z * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0972
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u v : G, x = (op y (op z (op w (op u v))))) :
    ∀ x y z w u v : G, (op x x) = (op y (op y (op z y)))
